judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the key first action of moving to fresh air and keeping the worker calm, but misses the required immediate action to assist breathing if needed. It also adds ungrounded details like loosening clothing, sitting upright, and an immediate poison-center/emergency call not tied to the source trigger.
